=== NOTES - 2005-06-16 Campbell's Field, Camden, NJ.txt
===================
===================
===================
Campbell's Field
Camden, New Jersey
16 June 2005

2005 US Summer Tour with Willie Nelson.
 
Stereo audience recording, 90 minutes.
 
1. Intro 
2.  Drifter's Escape
3. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
4. Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum
5. Love Minus Zero-No Limit
6. Down Along the Cove
7. Girl from the North Country
8. Highway 61 Revisited
9. A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall
10. Floater (Too Much to Ask)
11. Honest with Me
12. Forever Young
13. High Water (for Charlie Patton)
 —
14. It Ain't Me, Babe
15. Like a Rolling Stone


Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & piano), Stu Kimball (guitar), Denny Freeman (guitar), Donnie Herron (violin, mandolin, pedal steel guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Receli (drums & percussion).
